title: Quickr
description: Quickest way to add Client HUDs
body:
Quickr Pre-Alpha

**Quickr is currently being in heavy development. This mod also requires [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** The Quickr mod is a client that lets users add client HUDs into their game. The user can add HUDs such as FPS, Attack cooldown, world, etc. The HUDs are also customizable and can be repositioned.

> To open the menu, you have to hit the K key, the keybind can be changed in the controls menu of the pause screen.
